labels.value: select node,superblock_capacity from stv_superblock where num_blocks > 0
select node_num,value from stv_fdisk_stats where name='blocks_allocated_total'

select count(distinct id) from pg_catalog.stv_tbl_perm where temp = false and db_id > 1 and id not in (select oid from pg_class where relname like 'redshift_auto_health_check_99999999' and relnamespace in (select oid from pg_namespace where nspname='pg_internal'))

select backup_id,starttime,currenttime,sb_version,in_progress,error_code,error_msg,enc_key_hash_base64,num_tables from STL_BACKUP_LEADER where (BACKUP_ID, CURRENTTIME) in  ( select BACKUP_ID, max(CURRENTTIME) from STL_BACKUP_LEADER group by BACKUP_ID having max(CURRENTTIME) > '2025-02-27 02:25:41.643' /* "1 */ ) and enc_key_hash_base64 != 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA=' order by CURRENTTIME asc

select backup_id,starttime,currenttime,sb_version,node_num,state,permanent_blocks,blocks_to_upload,blocks_uploaded,num_failures,distall_blocks,non_distall_blocks from STL_BACKUP_COMPUTE where (BACKUP_ID, NODE_NUM, CURRENTTIME) in  ( select BACKUP_ID, NODE_NUM, max(CURRENTTIME) from STL_BACKUP_COMPUTE group by BACKUP_ID, NODE_NUM having max(CURRENTTIME) > '2025-02-27 02:25:41.643' /* "1 */)  order by CURRENTTIME asc, NODE_NUM asc
select node,superblock_capacity from stv_superblock where num_blocks > 0
select node_num,value from stv_fdisk_stats where name='blocks_allocated_total'

select count(distinct id) from pg_catalog.stv_tbl_perm where temp = false and db_id > 1 and id not in (select oid from pg_class where relname like 'redshift_auto_health_check_99999999' and relnamespace in (select oid from pg_namespace where nspname='pg_internal'))
select node_num,value from stv_fdisk_stats where name='blocks_allocated_total'
select node,superblock_capacity from stv_superblock where num_blocks > 0

select count(distinct id) from pg_catalog.stv_tbl_perm where temp = false and db_id > 1 and id not in (select oid from pg_class where relname like 'redshift_auto_health_check_99999999' and relnamespace in (select oid from pg_namespace where nspname='pg_internal'))
